value.layout: {"params":{"verseId":{"type":"string","optional":true,"value":""},"autoConnect":{"type":"boolean","optional":true,"value":true},"showUI":{"type":"boolean","optional":true,"value":true},"showIcon":{"type":"boolean","optional":true,"value":true},"showLoginSplashScreen":{"type":"boolean","optional":true,"value":false},"ConnectNotifications":{"type":"boolean","optional":true,"value":false},"QuestUpdateNotifications":{"type":"boolean","optional":true,"value":false},"InventoryUpdateNotifications":{"type":"boolean","optional":true,"value":false},"debugUserProfileLogs":{"type":"boolean","optional":true,"value":false}},"actions":[{"methodName":"FORGEConnect","description":"Connect this entity’s Forge script to the backend (auth + heartbeat). Trigger from another entity (e.g. button or trigger), or rely on **Auto connect** in the inspector.","params":{}},{"methodName":"FORGEDisconnect","description":"Disconnect from Forge: stops heartbeat and clears the session token. Trigger from another entity when you want to fully tear down the connection.","params":{}},{"methodName":"FORGEQuestAction","description":"Send a quest action to Forge (e.g. complete a step or task). **Creator Hub:** use optional `variableKey1` / `variableValue1` (and 2–3) for up to three variables. **From code:** pass a single variables object as 4th arg, or an array of `{ id, value }`, or use the flat key/value slots.","params":{"questId":{"type":"string","optional":false,"value":""},"stepId":{"type":"string","optional":false,"value":""},"taskId":{"type":"string","optional":false,"value":""},"variableKey1":{"type":"string","optional":true,"value":""},"variableValue1":{"type":"string","optional":true,"value":""},"variableKey2":{"type":"string","optional":true,"value":""},"variableValue2":{"type":"string","optional":true,"value":""},"variableKey3":{"type":"string","optional":true,"value":""},"variableValue3":{"type":"string","optional":true,"value":""}}},{"methodName":"FORGEGenericAction","description":"Send a generic Forge action by **action ID** (configured in The Forge dashboard). **Creator Hub:** use optional `variableKey1` / `variableValue1` (and 2–3) for up to three variables. **From code:** pass a variables object as 2nd arg, or `[{id,value},…]`, or use flat key/value slots.","params":{"actionId":{"type":"string","optional":false,"value":""},"variableKey1":{"type":"string","optional":true,"value":""},"variableValue1":{"type":"string","optional":true,"value":""},"variableKey2":{"type":"string","optional":true,"value":""},"variableValue2":{"type":"string","optional":true,"value":""},"variableKey3":{"type":"string","optional":true,"value":""},"variableValue3":{"type":"string","optional":true,"value":""}}},{"methodName":"FORGEOpenShop","description":"Open the shop for a specific creator wallet. If a shop is already open it is closed first — only one shop can be open at a time. Seeds wallet + resets shop state, then runs uiActions[\"open-shop\"] from config.","params":{"creatorWallet":{"type":"string","optional":false,"value":""}}},{"methodName":"FORGECloseShop","description":"Close the shop. Steps are defined in the behavior config under uiActions[\"close-shop\"].","params":{}},{"methodName":"FORGEPurchaseItem","description":"Purchase the currently selected item. Steps (POST purchase, handle result, refresh inventory) are defined in the behavior config under uiActions[\"purchase-item\"].","params":{}},{"methodName":"FORGERefreshLeaderboard","description":"Refetch leaderboard from GET /api/leaderboard/:id (honors uiState.leaderboardSource: cache | subgraph).","params":{}}]}
